_notes: Routes are matched top-to-bottom by URL-path prefix; list the most
env:NAME                     static API key from the proxy's environment
token-file:/path#a.b.c       JSON field read FRESH on every request
token-cmd:some command       stdout of a command, per request
Point the box's env at this proxy (devbox --proxy handles it):

routes._comment: Anthropic / Claude — API-key mode (default). To use a Claude subscription OAuth login instead, swap 'auth' for the oauth block shown below in _oauth_variant.

_oauth_variant._comment: Replace the /v1/messages route's 'auth' + 'set_headers' with this to proxy a Claude subscription OAuth login. The token is read fresh from the host's credential file per request; the host keeps it refreshed. The anthropic-beta value may need updating if Anthropic changes it.
